title: asarum glabratum
intro: Asarum glabratum, also known as the flat umbel winter ginger or Asarabacca, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Aristolochiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Asarum glabratum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
